William Turner

2 works in the gallery.

Study of a Tree in Bloom
by William Turner
England · 1830–1840 · Watercolor and gouache on ivory wove paper
A View from Moel Cynwich: Looking Over the Vale of Afon Mawddach and Toward Cader Idris
by William Turner
England, 19th century · c. 1850 · watercolor with scratch-away, heightened with white
